message:
refactor(mcp-helpers): replace wildcard import in test module with
explicit imports

Replace use super::* in the mcp_helpers test module with explicit
imports of the 16 types, constants, and functions actually used by
tests: ActionKind, ActorKind, CompatRuntimeBuilder, Config,
DecisionContext, IpcPaneState, MCP_REFRESH_COOLDOWN_MS,
PaneCapabilities, PolicyDecision, PolicySurface,
SEND_OSC_SEGMENT_LIMIT, StorageHandle, and 7 helper functions.

Also adds explicit std::time::Instant import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
